---
title: "Precios del plÃ¡tano en Tenerife"
author: "Luis LÃ³pez-Manzanares"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = F,
  message = F,
  options(OutDec = ","),
  fig.dim = c(6, 5) # width = 6, height = 5 
  )
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r data-load}
ds <- read_delim("../data/raw/dataset-ISTAC-C00014A_000012-1.3-observations.tsv",
                 show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  filter(
    territorio == "Tenerife",
    !is.na(obs_value)
    ) %>% 
  select(1,3,6) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = medidas,
    values_from = obs_value
  ) %>% 
  select(1,2) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(str_sub(time_period, 1, 4)),
    sem = str_c(
      str_extract(time_period, "\\d+"),
      str_extract(time_period, "\\d+$")
#      "1" 
    ),
#    sem = factor(sem, levels = unique(sem)),
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(
    pmp = `Precio medio ponderado`
  )
```

# Precio del plátano

```{r gr-precio-linea}
ggplot(ds, aes(sem, pmp, fill = year)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge")
```
